text.title: Cloud Provider Selection Decision Tree Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the decision-tree-cloud-provider methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.input: team productivity stack, workload profile, compliance matrix, cost envelope.
step.action: Fill the prerequisites table; any blank cell blocks progression.
step.decision-gate: Any missing prerequisite → STOP and escalate.

step.name: apply-compliance-gate
step.action: Eliminate any provider missing a required certification or sovereign region.
step.decision-gate: Empty shortlist → exit to bare-metal / sovereign cloud path.

step.name: apply-existing-investment-branch
step.action: If Microsoft-heavy → Azure default; if Google-heavy → GCP default; if neutral → continue to step 4.

step.name: apply-workload-fit-branch
step.input: Workload profile + neutral signal from step 3.
step.action: Route by workload niche (analytics/ML → GCP, enterprise breadth → AWS, hybrid on-prem → Azure).

step.name: emit-adr
step.action: Compose ADR with status=Proposed, drivers, considered options, decision, runner-up, review-trigger.
step.decision-gate: Missing runner-up OR missing review-trigger → reject.
